questions.question:

 Column I
 Column II

 a. Br2HC−CHBr2
 ii. CH3C $\equiv$ CH + 2Hl $\rightarrow$
 b. H3C−CHBr2
 iii. $\mathrm{HC} \equiv \mathrm{CH}+2 \mathrm{Br}_{2} \stackrel{\mathrm{CCl}_{4}}{\longrightarrow}$
 c. H3C−CI2−CH3
 iv. $\mathrm{HC} \equiv \mathrm{CH}+2 \mathrm{HBr} \longrightarrow$
 d. H3C−CHICH2I
 e. H2C=CHCl
questions.question_raw:
Match the reactants and reagents in Column I with products in Column II.

Column I Column II
i. HC {tex}\equiv{/tex} CH + HCl {tex}\rightarrow{/tex} a. Br2HC−CHBr2
ii. CH3C {tex}\equiv{/tex} CH + 2Hl {tex}\rightarrow{/tex} b. H3C−CHBr2
iii. {tex}\mathrm{HC} \equiv \mathrm{CH}+2 \mathrm{Br}_{2} \stackrel{\mathrm{CCl}_{4}}{\longrightarrow}{/tex} c. H3C−CI2−CH3
iv. {tex}\mathrm{HC} \equiv \mathrm{CH}+2 \mathrm{HBr} \longrightarrow{/tex} d. H3C−CHICH2I
  e. H2C=CHCl

options.text: i - d, ii - c, iii - a, iv - b
i - e, ii - c, iii - b, iv - a
i - e, ii - d, iii - a, iv - b
i - e, ii - c, iii - a, iv - b

 (iii) Birch reduction
 (c) R-X + H2 $\xrightarrow{{{\text{Zn}}/{\text{HCl}}}}$ R - H + HX

questions.question:
The correct statement regarding the comparison of staggered and eclipsed conformations of ethane, is:
 the eclipsed conformation of ethane is more stable than staggered conformation even though the eclipsed conformation has torsional strain.
 the staggered conformation of ethane is more stable than eclipsed conformation, because staggered conformation has no torsional strain.

 the eclipsed conformation of ethane is more stable than staggered conformation, because eclipsed conformation has no torsional strain.
questions.question_raw:

  1. the eclipsed conformation of ethane is more stable than staggered conformation even though the eclipsed conformation has torsional strain.
  2. the staggered conformation of ethane is more stable than eclipsed conformation, because staggered conformation has no torsional strain.
  3. the staggered conformation of ethane is less stable than eclipsed conformation, because staggered conformation has torsional strain.
  4. the eclipsed conformation of ethane is more stable than staggered conformation, because eclipsed conformation has no torsional strain.
